title: Example Contact Form Preview Input
description: Input contract for a validate-only write-precheck package. It identifies a writable target and proposed public-safe input summary without authorizing submit.

url.description: Public Example Domain URL to read. The sample package accepts only example.org origins.

requested_fields.description: Optional public fields requested from the normalized output.

include_source_refs.description: Whether Core should preserve source reference placeholders in the read result when available.

target_ref.description: Harbor-owned writable target ref. Lode stores only the ref shape, not browser state.

proposed_input_summary.description: Public-safe summary of the intended draft or preview input; raw field values stay outside Lode.

no_submit_guard.description: Declares that this package can validate or preview only and must not submit.

examples.proposed_input_summary: Preview a contact form message without submitting it.

invalid_input_classes.trigger: url is not on https://example.org or https://www.example.org
invalid_input_classes.recovery_hint: Use the reserved sample origin declared by the package manifest.

invalid_input_classes.trigger: requested_fields contains a field outside the schema enum
invalid_input_classes.recovery_hint: Request only fields declared by this input schema.

invalid_input_classes.trigger: input contains cookies, tokens, profile state, runtime session, raw evidence body, or user business data
invalid_input_classes.recovery_hint: Keep runtime identity and evidence in Core/Harbor references, not Lode package input.
